titleStmt.title: SII 15.191: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 191. (B.K. No. 32 of 1929-30.) JEṬṬIGI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing before the Hanumān temple.

This is dated Śaka 1178, Naḷa, Pusya ba. 30, Monday, solar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. The only solar eclipse of the year occurred in the month of Nija Jyēshṭha. The details of the tithi only correspond to 1257 A.D., January 17 when there was no Saṁkramaṇa. The week-day also was Wednesday.

The epigraph commences with the well known Vachana of Siddharāma and records a gift of the village Daṭṭugi in the tract of Nālvattumbāḍa to the god Kapilasiddha-Mallikārjuna of Sonnalāpura by the king's subordinate Sāmanta Muddigidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ jaya paramēsvara paramātma Ī
śvaranurvvī parvvi Aḍaṁgikoṁḍirppa vō
rbbaṁṇnageyāgi yōgigeḷa ma
nada koneya jyōtīsvaranuṁ vriśa
bhana rūpāgi yajamānanuṁ
Ācāryyanuṁ tānayāgi yōgā
di saṁpaṁna khaḷeyaṁgaḷellavaṁ
saṁpādisi yōgaramaṇiya kṣē
tremane staḷaviṭṭu salākhaviḍidu Abhi
nava śrīsaiḷamane māḍi kapilasiddha malli
kārjjunadēvane nelasi niṁdu puṁṇya pā
paṁgaḷaṁ baraṁ pēḷdu besaṁ pēḷutti
ralu Ēṁ besaṁ dēvā Enalu yī sthāna
dalu mānyavāgidda vūrugaḷaṁ bhūmi
gaḷaṁ dhanagaḷaṁ Ī liṁgakke hastōdaka
maṁ māḍi koṭṭudaṁ manaṁ pēsade kaḷedu koṁ
ḍaheneṁbātana Atana mātā māte
ya piturggaḷallamaṁ Eppattēḷukōṭivarusa
ṁbaraṁ puḷugoṁḍada narakadoḷa
gikki ni nāhutigoḷuttiru gaṁḍā E
le pāpavē . yī dēvana bhūmi dhanakkāna
ṁjuveneṁdu paṁdeya pāvaḍarddaṁ
te manaṁ bedaṟi poḍavaṭṭanaṁ bēga
sīghraṁ koṁḍu bā kaṁḍā Ele puṁ
ṇyavē kaviḷāsake yiṁteraḍaṟa beṁge
puṁṇyapāpaṁgaḷu pārddukoṁḍoydu
tappadu diṭha diṭhaṁ satyaṁ gaṁ
ḍire Eṁba Ājñāvacananiyamadiṁ vi
racisida Anādisiddhanuṁ jagatprasiddha
nuṁ Aṇima garima lagima mahima
prācya prākāvya Īśitva vasitvameṁba Aṣṭamā
diguṇaisvaryyasaṁpaṁna
nuṁ bēḷva bhaktijanamanōnnutakaḷā
prasaṁnanu nirvvikaraṇaṁ visuddha
haraṇaṁ vahnirvvinā jvaḷanuṁ nāḍi
bhāḷanaṁ nādabiṁduddhaninaṁ dēha
sya saṁkrāmaṇaṁ Ātmajyōtinidarṣa
ṇaṁ svachaṁdhamrituṁjaya(ṁ)meṁ
ba daśapratyaya prabuddhanuṁ siddhaThe continuation is lost. ṣo the lines in the next side are numbered seperately.

kaḷikāvikāśabhāskara māḷavamalla Arirāya vura
sella gūrjjaravāraṇāṁkusa teluṁgarāya si
raḥkamaḷanāḷamūḷōtpāṭana . punarapi sthāpanā
cāryya hammīrarāya nirmmāḷōchēda bhū
durgga giridurgga jaladurgga vanadurgga pramukhya nā
nādurgga vidrāvaṇa kīrttigaruḍadhvaja śrīmatu
prauḍhapratāpa cakravartti śrī kahnaradēvavijaya
rājyōdayi śrīmatu sakavarṣa 1178 neya naḷa saṁ
vatsara pusya ba 30 sōmavāra sūryyagraha
ṇa vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇadaṁdu © svasti sa
masta visphuritaguṇamahimamahōṁnata
nuṁ sāmaṁtasameyaĀjñāniyāmanenipa Aṁ
maṇadēva kunaradēvasuta sivapāda
sēkhara kaliyuga vīrabhadrāvatāra sivasamaya
saṁpaṁna baṁdhujanaprasaṁna vaiṇāvaisikanai
tika narttakanaṭaka parīta gāyaka daṁḍimu
ḍi sikhaṁḍi sōḍasayācakajana pramukhya dī
nānāthadaridratimiraharaṇadivākara saraṇagata
kripākara vairisāvaṁtatārakasaḍānanaṁ budhaja
nōtpaḷatā nanuṁ sāvaṁta samudra
�ṁ A�visamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēkhā
rēvaṁtanuṁ sāvaṁtasikhāmaṇi siṁghaji sāvaṁta
maṁtārarāyasthāpanācāryya parabaḷakritāṁ
tanuṁ Āḷiṁ muṁniṟiva sauryyamaṁ meṟe
va vīrōṁnatikke . kaḷasanuṁ sāhasaviḷasenuṁ
sāvaṁta vāḍerāyanuṁ rāya kuma
ranārāyaṇanuṁ śrīsōmanāthadēvara dibya
śrīpādapadmārādhakanu parabaḷasādhakanenipa
muddigidēva śrīmatu dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi Abhi
nava śrīsaiḷa śrīsoṁnalapuravarādhīsvara
śrī kapilasiddhamallikārjjunadēvara Aṁgabhō
ga raṁgabhōga khaṁḍaspuṭita jīrṇnōddhāra Avā
risatrādyanēka śrīkāryyārtthakaṁ Ā nālvattu
ṁ bāḍadoḷage taṁnāḷva praviṣṭa grāma
doḷage daṭṭugi grāmavanu Aṣṭāghā
ṭa jala pāṣāṇa nidhi nidhāna nikṣēpa
trika Aṣṭabhōga tēja svā The rest of the record is broken away and lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
